title: Leishmania detection in clinical samples with probes, V1, ECLIPSE WP5 Task 3
author: VARANI, STEFANIA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The dataset is related to the clinical study. Data on Leishmania-positive and Leishmania-negative clinical samples will be obtained from the diagnostic routine at IRCCS-AOUBO, including real-time PCR data, and will be compared with results obtained by employing the newly developed platform based on oligo-DNA  probes.   The data were generated in the framework of the Horizon Europe project ECLIPSE.
